name: resetFlexRayCCEx
title: resetFlexRayCCEx
syntax: long resetFlexRayCCEx (int channel, int wuChMask, int wuCount, int wuTxIdle, int wuTxLow, char[] cfg);
description: This function initializes the FlexRay Communication Controller (CC) and generates the specified wake-up pattern before reintegration in the cluster or the start-up.
The following program resets the FlexRay interface of the attached channel and sends a wake-up (if network is idle), when the <W> key is pressed.
